final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: fine art print, traditional Chinese painting
Primary request: Chinese ink wash landscape painting with distant mountains, mist, pine trees, thatched cottage, and an elderly man fishing by a stream
Scene/backdrop: layered mountain ranges fading into mist, winding stream, atmospheric clouds
Subject: distant indigo mountains, swirling mist and clouds, pine trees, thatched cottage, elderly man fishing by the stream
Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash painting (shanshui), xuan paper texture, brush stroke aesthetics
Composition/framing: classic Chinese scroll composition with intentional negative space, layered depth from foreground to distant peaks
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, ethereal and contemplative atmosphere, serene and transcendent mood
Color palette: monochromatic ink tones, subtle gradations from deep black to pale gray, touches of indigo for distant mountains
Materials/textures: ink bleeding on absorbent paper, dry brush textures, wet ink washes, visible brush strokes
Constraints: maintain traditional Chinese painting aesthetics with proper use of negative space, preserve the empty space philosophy of Eastern art
Avoid: Western perspective, photorealistic rendering, saturated colors, hard edges, modern elements
